quests.title: The iron vigil
quests.description: The Tower asks you to hold the line. Not to advance. Simply to hold.
quests.instruction: Complete 3 sets of any pressing motion — stop 2 reps before failure

quests.title: The long descent
quests.description: What you build in the deep is not visible until you surface.
quests.instruction: 40 min of Zone 2 cardio — conversational pace throughout

quests.title: Anchor the base
quests.description: The Tower's foundation does not crack. Neither will yours.
quests.instruction: 5 sets of hip hinge pattern — 8 reps, controlled eccentric

quests.title: Cold clarity
quests.description: The cold does not ask if you are ready. You enter it anyway.
quests.instruction: 2 min cold exposure — shower or immersion, any temperature below comfort

quests.title: The focused interval
quests.description: Precision is its own kind of strength. Today you train both.
quests.instruction: 4 rounds: 30 sec max effort any movement, 90 sec full rest

quests.title: The long haul
quests.description: This week you do not rush. You accumulate.
quests.instruction: Log 4 completed training sessions this week — any modality counts

storyBeat: The Tower has watched you hold the line for fourteen days. It does not say well done. It opens the next floor.
